zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Byron於大約1398年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲時，她的父親John de Byron III28歲，母親Margery Booth13歲。她於1417年與John Thomas de Ashton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1460年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Byron于大约1398年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲时，她的父亲John de Byron III28岁，母亲Margery Booth13岁。她于1417年与John Thomas de Ashton在英国英格兰藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1460年在英国英格兰藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Byron was born about 1398, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, her father, John de Byron III, was 28 and her mother, Margery Booth, was 13. She married John Thomas de Ashton in 1417, in Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1460, in Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Elle a épousé John Thomas de Ashton en 1417, à Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. ko.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Byron(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Byron III(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Booth(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니에서 John Thomas de Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Thomas de Ashton em 1417, em Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Byron родилась около 1398 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Byron III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Booth, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas de Ashton в 1417 г. в местности аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1460 г. в местности аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
